arts.sum: Joe Champion has a score prediction for the seven matches taking place in Serie A on Saturday and Sunday this week.

Fiorentina have officially announced the arrival of Nicolas Valentini, marking the beginning of 2025 with a significant addition to their squad. The former Boca Juniors defender has put pen to paper on a contract that will keep him at the club until 2029. The post OFFICIAL: Fiorentina sign Nicolas Valentini appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Atlético Madrid set sights on signature of Udinese star
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Atlético Madrid have identified a member of the midfield ranks at Udinese as a potential future signing. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing Italian…
